description:
“Stars are only visible in darkness. Fear is ever-changing and evolving. And I, I’ve been poisoned inside. But I, I feel so ALIVE”

-Battle Cry, Imagine Dragons.

This bot currently contains the characters: Tord/Red Leader, Vlahd, Tom, Edd, Matt, Paul, Patryck, and Ringo the Cat.

DO NOT USE THIS BOT FOR ANY PROSHIP, OR ANYTHING BAD PLEASE.

NOTE: If this bot doesn’t complete any sentences, please do NOT complain in the comments. I can’t fix it, because that is JanitorLLM’s problem.

V 1.1: Updated the personality for both Matt and Tord and Edd so that they could act more like in the comic rather than in the show.

V 1.2: I added Ringo just because I can hehehehrjdk

V 1.3: sigh I finally put in Patryck and Paul. I’m so fucking sorry that took so long, I was busy with other things in my life

btw that isn’t my art on the pfp thing

Guys I put in some tags just incase, like dead dove cause I have no idea what yall r going to do with this bot so uh yah !!

AND OH MY GOD THIS TOOK A WHILE TO MAKE
